name: Jill of All Trades
description: Jill of All Trades is an Epic Class Mod for Gaige in Borderlands 2, included with the Mechromancer character add-on.
notes: Its name appears to be a gender-flipped take on the phrase "Jack of all trades".

special.description: At max level, this Class Mod boosts assault rifles with +52% AR damage and +59% AR magazine size.

abilities: +4 Smaller Lighter Faster Skil IEDIORE t j
